posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Do you know if it is possible to updates automatically some values that are in a column when I update an excel file ? Here is my use case :

  • I import an excel file into monday
  • I would like to automatically update values from the imported excel file in a specific column
    Is there a native way to do this or should I use a third party app or an API dev ?

Thank you for your help,

Have a nice day

Corentin

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@corentin.dalfarra,

There is currently no way to do this natively.

I developed a workbook that called monday APIs to do this. It is not simple. But, it is possible. I had originally offered to let others try it. However, I stopped development because of lack of interest/follow through. I assume that people were just scared off by idea of using VBA/“macros”?

There may be an app available.

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JCorrell

Thank you for your help, I am quite surprised that there is no native solution as I though it was a very common business need. I saw that some people had developed an app recently. Maybe I will also look about Zapier connexion between the two systems.

Thanks, have a nice day,

Corentin

posts.author: gregdotcom (Greg)
posts.cookedHtml: I would use Integromat rather than Zapier, personally
